title: Spectral Spirits
description: Meet your very own guardian spirit!
body:
Spectral Spirits is a mod about the guardian spirits in the world. They protect you and help you, faithful companions by your side.
These otherworldly beings have a way of touching this world ever so slightly, so that they are part of our world, but dwell in another plane. Work together, learn together, and discover new ways magic along the way.

## This mod is in alpha - changes are bound to happen, and updating may not be supported
Please proceed with caution.

To get started in the very early build, use `/spectralSpirits` to open up a GUI and summon your own spirit.

This mod was made for [ModFest: Carnival](https://modfest.net/carnival).
